arts.ttl: 'I've been told': £45m Arsenal player may stay at the Emirates at the last minute, he was set to leave - journalist
arts.sum: This wouldn't be a bad idea at all...

arts.ttl: ‘Sometimes you shout against the wind’ - Crystal Palace wanted Arsenal clash moved ahead of FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: The Eagles, who play Aston Villa at Wembley on Saturday in the FA Cup semi-final, have one day fewer to prepare for the clash as Unai Emery’s side played Manchester City on Tuesday night. Oliver Glasner has revealed that Crystal Palace wanted to move their Premier League clash against Arsenal on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Crystal Palace to the Emirates Stadium tonight for a midweek London derby. A loss for the Gunners this evening would confirm Liverpool as the 2024/25 Premier League champions. Bukayo Saka may be rested as the medical staff monitor his minutes. The winger was on the end of some forceful treatment last weekend in […] The post Arsenal vs Crystal Palace – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Every word from Mikel Arteta's pre-Palace presser
arts.sum: Our manager was asked to provide the latest team news, share his thoughts on former players going into management like Jack Wilshere and Aaron Ramsey, and more on Wednesday's game against the Eagles. If we want to, I think he would have a good chance to play tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Leroy Sane: Arsenal target turns down ‘HUGE’ offer with €45m contract still on the table
arts.sum: Arsenal have been given a major update on the future of Leroy Sane, the Bayern Munich winger who could act as an alternative to Nico Williams should they miss out on the Athletic Club and Spain star. The winger is locked in contract talks with the Bundesliga leaders, who are offering him a three-year deal worth a maximum of €15m per season.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Crystal Palace: TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Crystal Palace's priorities lie in winning silverware elsewhere this season ahead of their Premier League clash in north London, with the Gunners heavy favourites going into the game

arts.ttl: 'He can': Mikel Arteta admits that one Arsenal star might play in a different position against PSG
arts.sum: Although Arsenal have a Premier League match against Crystal Palace to contend with beforehand, a lot of Mikel Arteta’s focus may have already turned to...

arts.ttl: Journalist says it ‘seems to be a done deal’ and player is off to Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal’s interest in Real Sociedad’s Martín Zubimendi has been repeatedly reported in the UK and Spain. On April 2nd, AS reported the Gunners have informed the midfielder’s entourage of their willingness to activate his €60m clause. It was also stated Real Madrid could snatch him from Arsenal’s clutches. Journalist Juan Castro, writing in his column The post Journalist says it ‘seems to be a done deal’ and player is off to Arsenal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace in talks to sign ‘talented’ youngster – Contract expires in June, renewal unlikely
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt’s Tamiou Kpebane has emerged as a transfer target for Crystal Palace for the summer window. That’s at least what Fussball Transfers are reporting, and they mention Crystal Palace when covering Hamburger SV’s interest in the 18-year-old. They state Hamburger SV have the ‘talented player’ on their radar and are eyeing a move for The post Crystal Palace in talks to sign ‘talented’ youngster – Contract expires in June, renewal unlikely appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Memory Lane: Palace's previous Wembley visits
arts.sum: Crystal Palace’s first ever visit to Wembley took place in 1988 - 65 years after the national stadium first opened in 1923. After that long awaited debut, the Eagles have managed to return on plenty of occasions.
